title: UI/UX Web Designer needed for Premium Restaurant Website (Wix Studio or Framer
brief: Hello, we are a digital boutique agency based in Portugal. We are are looking for a talented and experienced Web Designer to join us for a premium restaurant website project, with the potential for long-term collaboration on future client projects this year. What we need: * A high-end, clean, and modern minimalist design (Dark Mode aesthetic preferred, focusing heavily on high-quality food photography). * Structure: Home, Interactive Food Menu, and a functional Contact/Booking section. * Seamless integration of a fast, 3-click reservation/booking system. * 100% responsive design (perfectly optimized for mobile devices). Requirements: * Proven experience building premium websites using either Wix Studio or Framer. * Ability to deliver clean layouts with smooth animations/transitions. To apply, please provide: 1. Links to 2 or 3 live websites you have personally built (preferably with a dark/modern aesthetic or booking systems). 2. Your fixed price for this project. 3. Your estimated turnaround time. We look forward to reviewing your portfolios and starting a great partnership!
